articles.title: Communities lead search for sheriff lieutenant’s lost dog with aid of police drone
articles.description:
The 3-year-old Catahoula leopard dog has been missing since Friday afternoon and was only briefly seen once since.

The post Communities lead search for sheriff lieutenant’s lost dog with aid of police drone appeared first on Boston.com.
